title: D-003: first-wave integration + second-wave preparation
objective: Govern the D-002 sequential integration of first-wave PRs #99/#100/#101 (correction capsules, tiny controller control-amendment if needed, one-at-a-time accept/merge), then contract a second blind-isolated wave from a new frozen main SHA. Control-plane only; producer-task acceptances flow through their own D-002 lifecycles.
